framework.name: Danish NIS2 Implementation (L 111)
framework.name_nl: Dansk NIS2-implementering (Lov om net- og informationssikkerhed)
framework.scope: Network and information security requirements for essential and important entities in Denmark under NIS2 transposition
framework.structure_description: Requirements organized by NIS2 obligations: governance, risk management measures (Art. 21), incident reporting (Art. 23), supervision, registration, and cooperation.

controls.title: Management responsibility for cybersecurity (NIS2 Art. 20)
controls.description: Management of essential and important entities must approve and supervise cybersecurity measures and can be held accountable for violations.
controls.description_nl: Ledelsen i vaesentlige og vigtige enheder skal godkende og foeere tilsyn med cybersikkerhedsforanstaltninger og kan holdes ansvarlig for overtraedelser.
controls.implementation_guidance: Bestyrelsesmedlemmer skal gennemga cybersikkerhedstraening. Dokumenter ledelsens godkendelse af risikostyringsforanstaltninger.

controls.title: Management cybersecurity training
controls.description: Members of management bodies in NIS2-covered entities must undergo cybersecurity training to be able to assess risks and approve measures.
controls.description_nl: Medlemmer af ledelsesorganer i NIS2-omfattede enheder skal gennemga cybersikkerhedstraening for at kunne vurdere risici og godkende foranstaltninger.

controls.title: Policies for risk analysis and information security
controls.description: The entity must have documented policies for risk analysis and information system security approved by management.
controls.description_nl: Enheden skal have dokumenterede politikker for risikoanalyse og informationssystemsikkerhed der er godkendt af ledelsen.

controls.title: Incident handling
controls.description: The entity must have processes for prevention, detection, and response to incidents in accordance with NIS2.
controls.description_nl: Enheden skal have processer til forebyggelse, detektering og reaktion pa haendelser i overensstemmelse med NIS2.

controls.title: Business continuity and crisis management
controls.description: The entity must have business continuity plans including backup, disaster recovery, and crisis management.
controls.description_nl: Enheden skal have planer for driftskontinuitet inklusiv backup, katastrofegendannelse og krisestyring.

controls.title: Supply chain security
controls.description: The entity must manage security risks in the supply chain including direct suppliers and service providers.
controls.description_nl: Enheden skal haandtere sikkerhedsrisici i forsyningskaeden inklusiv direkte leverandoerer og tjenesteudbydere.

controls.title: Security in procurement and development
controls.description: Security must be integrated in procurement, development, and maintenance of network and information systems including vulnerability management.
controls.description_nl: Sikkerhed skal integreres i anskaffelse, udvikling og vedligeholdelse af net- og informationssystemer inklusiv sarbarhedshandtering.

controls.title: Assessment of measures effectiveness
controls.description: The entity must have processes to assess the effectiveness of cybersecurity measures.
controls.description_nl: Enheden skal have processer til at vurdere effektiviteten af cybersikkerhedsforanstaltninger.

controls.title: Basic cyber hygiene and training
controls.description: The entity must implement basic cyber hygiene practices and cybersecurity training for all employees.
controls.description_nl: Enheden skal implementere grundlaeggende cyberhygiejnepraksisser og cybersikkerhedstraening for alle medarbejdere.

controls.title: Use of cryptography and encryption
controls.description: The entity must have policies and procedures for the use of cryptography and encryption for data protection.
controls.description_nl: Enheden skal have politikker og procedurer for brug af kryptografi og kryptering til beskyttelse af data.

controls.title: Personnel security and access control
controls.description: The entity must have processes for personnel security, asset management, and access control policies.
controls.description_nl: Enheden skal have processer for personalesikkerhed, aktiv-forvaltning og adgangskontrolpolitikker.

controls.title: Multi-factor or continuous authentication
controls.description: The entity must use multi-factor or continuous authentication and secured communication solutions.
controls.description_nl: Enheden skal anvende multi-faktor- eller kontinuerlig autentifikation og sikrede kommunikationsloesninger.

controls.title: Early warning within 24 hours
controls.description: In a significant incident, the entity must send an early warning to CSIRT/CFCS within 24 hours of becoming aware of the incident.
controls.description_nl: Ved en vaesentlig haendelse skal enheden sende en tidlig advarsel til CSIRT/CFCS inden for 24 timer efter at have faaet kendskab til haendelsen.
controls.implementation_guidance: Etabler intern proces for hurtig eskalering af haendelser. Definer kriterier for vaesentlige haendelser.

controls.title: Incident notification within 72 hours
controls.description: An incident notification with initial assessment including severity and impact must be submitted within 72 hours.
controls.description_nl: En haendelsesunderretning med foerste vurdering inklusiv alvorsgrad og pavirkning skal indsendes inden for 72 timer.

controls.title: Final report within one month
controls.description: A detailed final report describing the incident, root cause, mitigation measures, and cross-border impact must be submitted within one month.
controls.description_nl: En detaljeret slutrapport med beskrivelse af haendelsen, grundaarsag, afboedningsforanstaltninger og graensoverskridende pavirkning skal indsendes inden for en maned.

controls.title: Supervisory authority audit powers
controls.description: The sector-responsible authority may require audit, inspection, and documentation of NIS2 compliance from covered entities.
controls.description_nl: Den sektoransvarlige myndighed kan kraeve audit, inspektion og dokumentation af NIS2-compliance hos omfattede enheder.

controls.title: Sanctions for non-compliance
controls.description: Non-compliance with NIS2 obligations can result in administrative fines of up to EUR 10 million or 2% of global turnover for essential entities.
controls.description_nl: Manglende overholdelse af NIS2-forpligtelser kan medfoere administrative boeder pa op til 10 mio. EUR eller 2% af global omsaetning for vaesentlige enheder.

controls.title: Registration as NIS2-covered entity
controls.description: Entities covered by NIS2 must register with the relevant sector authority with information about the company, contact points, and IP ranges.
controls.description_nl: Enheder omfattet af NIS2 skal registrere sig hos den relevante sektormyndighed med oplysninger om virksomhed, kontaktpunkter og IP-intervaller.

controls.title: Classification as essential or important entity
controls.title_nl: Klassifikation som vaesentlig eller vigtig enhed
controls.description: Entities must be classified as either essential or important based on size, sector, and criticality in accordance with the NIS2 annexes.
controls.description_nl: Enheder skal klassificeres som enten vaesentlige eller vigtige baseret pa storrelse, sektor og kritikalitet i henhold til NIS2-bilagene.

controls.title: Cooperation with national CSIRT (CFCS)
controls.description: NIS2-covered entities must cooperate with the national CSIRT (CFCS) and participate in information sharing arrangements.
controls.description_nl: NIS2-omfattede enheder skal samarbejde med den nationale CSIRT (CFCS) og deltage i informationsdelingsordninger.
controls.implementation_guidance: Tilmeld organisationen til CFCS varslingstjeneste. Deltag i sektorspecifikke informationsdelingsgrupper.

controls.title: Voluntary cyber threat information sharing
controls.description: Entities are encouraged to share information about cyber threats, vulnerabilities, and indicators of compromise with relevant authorities and other entities.
controls.description_nl: Enheder opfordres til at dele information om cybertrusler, sarbarheder og indikatorer for kompromittering med relevante myndigheder og andre enheder.

metadata.source: Lov om net- og informationssikkerhed (NIS2 dansk implementering)
